description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements, testing the ability to distinguish and correctly use tags beyond basic <div> and <span>. It is moderately challenging, presented with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners toward best practices. The quiz aims to reinforce proper semantic markup for modern web development.
Topics: HTML5 semantic tags, proper element usage, accessibility considerations, modern web standards
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone with basic HTML experience who wants to deepen their understanding of semantic markup.
